name: closed loop step coverage-to-audit flows coverage gaps into the standards-audit report
command: mkdir -p standards && printf '{"owasp-asvs":{"gaps":["5.2.5"]}}\n' > standards/coverage-matrix.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/closed-loop-test.sh" --step coverage-to-audit --coverage standards/coverage-matrix.json --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'coverage_gap=owasp-asvs:5.2.5 flowed_into=audit' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
